name: limadata-mcp
description: B2B data enrichment and intelligence — enrich people/companies, find emails & phones, prospect leads, search LinkedIn, and more via the Limadata API.
long_description:
Access the full Limadata B2B data platform from Claude Desktop. Includes 40+ tools for:

- **Enrichment** — Enrich person and company profiles with firmographic, technographic, and contact data
- **Contact Discovery** — Find work/personal emails, phone numbers, and social profiles
- **Search** — Search people, companies, jobs, and LinkedIn posts
- **Prospecting** — Advanced filtered prospecting for people and companies
- **Research** — AI-powered search and web page extraction
- **Batch Operations** — Bulk data retrieval for large lists
- **Watch/Webhooks** — Monitor people and companies for changes
- **Workplace Intel** — Glassdoor ratings and benefits data

Requires a Limadata API key. Get one at https://app.limadata.com/settings/apikeys

tools.name: enrich_person
tools.description: Enrich a person's professional profile using email, LinkedIn URL, or name+company

tools.name: enrich_company
tools.description: Enrich a company profile using domain or LinkedIn URL

tools.name: get_person
tools.description: Get person data from LinkedIn profile URL

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Get company data from LinkedIn company URL

tools.name: get_company_insights
tools.description: Get company insights from Crunchbase (funding, acquisitions)

tools.name: find_work_email
tools.description: Find a person's work email using name and company domain

tools.name: find_work_email_linkedin
